parents.subject: LU-18977 efalnd: set hstatus on error before kefalnd_tx_done()

commit.subject: LU-19286 tests: Add lnet cleanup to test_280 in sanity-lnet.sh
commit.message:
LU-19286 tests: Add lnet cleanup to test_280 in sanity-lnet.sh

test_280 in the sanity-lnet.sh test suite was missing proper lnet
cleanup before executing its test logic. This could lead to test
failures or inconsistent results when lnet modules are already
loaded from previous tests.

Added cleanup_lnet() call at the beginning of test_280() to ensure
a clean state before the test execution.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I29ba06e41aee3d7462be58e3c73a3266ba57b8c6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60865
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
